project: Field Service Membership & Data Governance System

fixes.title: No encryption-at-rest for SQLite
fixes.description: Added EncryptionService with Fernet + host-managed key; raw CSV encrypted in DB

fixes.title: Missing CSRF protection on state-changing endpoints
fixes.description: Initialized CSRFProtect globally; CSRF token in HTMX headers via base.html

fixes.title: Runtime debug=True hardcoded in run.py
fixes.description: run.py now reads debug from config; production defaults to False

fixes.title: Missing admin account controls (freeze/deactivate)
fixes.description: Added 6 new admin endpoints: deactivate/activate/freeze/unfreeze/change-role + user management UI

fixes.title: Search restricted to admin/manager only
fixes.description: Opened search to all authenticated users; added date-range filters and no-result recommendations

fixes.title: Cleansing pipeline missing required transformations
fixes.description: Added outlier detection (IQR), datetime/currency/imperial normalization, place-name reference table

fixes.title: No floorplan/pin UI for dispatch
fixes.description: Added interactive SVG grid with click-to-place pin and bidirectional coordinate sync

fixes.title: Stored XSS via |safe in search highlights
fixes.description: Created sanitize_highlight filter allowing only <mark> tags; registered as safe_highlight Jinja2 filter

fixes.title: Timeline timestamp format wrong (Y-m-d H:M:S instead of MM/DD/YYYY 12h)
fixes.description: Changed to %m/%d/%Y %I:%M %p format

fixes.title: No 60-second edit-lock warning UI
fixes.description: Added JavaScript countdown timer with warning banner after 60 seconds

fixes.title: Unhandled float() crashes on malformed numeric input
fixes.description: Added _safe_float() wrapper in dispatch and cleansing routes

fixes.title: Incomplete audit logging for read-volume detection
fixes.description: Added audit logging for member list/view/search actions feeding anomaly detection

fixes.title: README test counts incorrect (220 claimed vs 228 actual)
fixes.description: Corrected to 75 unit / 131 integration / 16 frontend / 6 e2e = 228 total

fixes.title: Trusted-device verification not used in login policy
fixes.description: Login now checks DeviceService.is_trusted(); warns on unrecognized devices

fixes.title: Seed command targets development DB while docker-compose uses production
fixes.description: seed.py now reads FLASK_CONFIG env var; README updated to document alignment

fixes.title: CSRF tokens missing from all POST form bodies
fixes.description: Added hidden csrf_token input to all 12 POST forms across templates

fixes.title: Eligibility address/member mismatch not validated
fixes.description: Added address.member_id != member_id check in EligibilityService

fixes.title: Encryption scope incomplete (results/flagged_data stored plaintext)
fixes.description: results and flagged_data now encrypted at rest; CleansingService.get_job_results() handles decrypt

fixes.title: Audit breadth incomplete (no address/service-area/export coverage)
fixes.description: Added audit to AddressService/ServiceAreaService CRUD; added /audit/export CSV endpoint

fixes.title: Admin search configuration UI not implemented
fixes.description: Added SystemConfig model, /admin/search-config route with persistent config values

fixes.title: Role-based home views not distinct for three roles
fixes.description: index.html now renders role-specific dashboards: Admin(6), Manager(3), Operator(2), Viewer(1)

fixes.title: Sensitive-action reauthentication not implemented
fixes.description: Added sensitive_action_reauth middleware + /auth/reauth route; applied to admin mutations

fixes.title: SLA compliance calculation hardcodes 2000ms
fixes.description: get_dashboard_stats() now uses _get_threshold() dynamically per metric type

fixes.title: Silent audit failure suppression hides observability regressions
fixes.description: All bare except:pass in audit paths replaced with logging.warning() with context

fixes.title: SQLite encryption not statically proven; no hard-fail
fixes.description: Added sqlcipher3-binary dependency; startup hard-fails in production if SQLCipher unavailable; PRAGMA key on real engine

fixes.title: Reauth bypass: before_request refreshes last_activity before decorator checks it
fixes.description: before_request snapshots _pre_refresh_activity into session BEFORE refresh; decorator reads pre-refresh value

fixes.title: Optimistic concurrency only on Member (not address/service-area)
fixes.description: Added version column to Address and ServiceArea models; forms pass version; routes enforce expected_version

fixes.title: Audit logs missing actor identity for dispatch CRUD
fixes.description: All dispatch service calls now pass user_id/username; _audit helper includes both fields

fixes.title: Encryption key artifact committed in workspace
fixes.description: Removed key files; .gitignore covers instance/*.key

fixes.title: Zero-coordinate values rejected in radius eligibility check
fixes.description: Changed truthiness check to explicit is None comparison

fixes.title: Audit completeness partial (tag ops, cleansing ops not logged)
fixes.description: Added audit to add_tag/remove_tag in MemberService; audit to delete_template in CleansingService

fixes.title: Timestamp format inconsistent across 11 template locations
fixes.description: Registered fmt_datetime Jinja2 filter; replaced all strftime calls in templates

fixes.title: Cleansing encryption fail-open allows plaintext at rest
fixes.description: Changed to fail-closed in production: create_job returns error, execute_job raises RuntimeError

fixes.title: SQLCipher key format incorrect (Fernet key used in hex PRAGMA)
fixes.description: Key generation uses os.urandom(32).hex() for proper 32-byte hex key

fixes.title: Audit identity incomplete (username not always populated)
fixes.description: AuditService.log() auto-resolves username from user_id; export CSV includes User ID column

fixes.title: Member restore missing audit; dispatch reads not logged
fixes.description: Added audit to MemberService.restore(); added read audit to address list and service area list routes

fixes.title: No site address book model (prompt requires member + site address books)
fixes.description: Added SiteAddress model, SiteAddressService CRUD with audit+versioning, dispatch routes and templates

fixes.title: Reauth not applied to all admin state-changing endpoints
fixes.description: Applied @sensitive_action_reauth to activate_user, unfreeze_user, search_config

fixes.title: Device fingerprint spoofable via header replay
fixes.description: Fingerprint now uses hmac.new() with SECRET_KEY binding

fixes.title: Service area validation too permissive for invalid configs
fixes.description: Added _validate_area() enforcing area_type, required fields per type, sane radius bounds

fixes.title: Template version update not atomic (commit between deactivate and create)
fixes.description: Removed intermediate commit; both happen in single transaction

fixes.title: Encryption key format conflict (SQLCipher hex vs Fernet base64 on same path)
fixes.description: Split into DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY_PATH (hex) and FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY_PATH (Fernet); each subsystem has its own key

fixes.title: Admin trusted-device oversight missing
fixes.description: Added admin_list_devices_for_user, admin_revoke_device, admin_revoke_all_devices; admin routes and template

fixes.title: Site address book incomplete (no edit, no server-side validation)
fixes.description: Added edit route with optimistic versioning; create/update now call AddressService._validate()

fixes.title: CRUD/read audit incomplete for site addresses
fixes.description: Added audit logging to site address list route

fixes.title: Audit export not reauth-gated
fixes.description: Applied @sensitive_action_reauth to /audit/export

fixes.title: Cleansing field masking hardcoded by key name only
fixes.description: Added sensitive_fields column to CleansingTemplate; UI merges template + system defaults

fixes.title: README overstates Docker as mandatory
fixes.description: Added local development alternative section with pip install + python run.py

fixes.title: SQLCipher verification on separate test connection, not real engine; key file committed
fixes.description: Self-test now runs on actual db.engine.connect(); key files removed; .gitignore covers instance/*.key

fixes.title: Member create/update + tags split across commits (non-atomic)
fixes.description: Tag operations wrapped in try/except with rollback on failure

fixes.title: Incomplete CRUD/read audit (workflow, device, cleansing views)
fixes.description: Added audit to workflow view, timeline view, device list, cleansing dashboard, site address list

fixes.title: SECRET_KEY placeholder accepted in production
fixes.description: create_app hard-fails with RuntimeError when production SECRET_KEY is default; docker-compose requires env var

fixes.title: Authorization returns redirects for HTMX/API requests
fixes.description: roles_required now returns 401/403 status codes for HX-Request headers

fixes.title: Cleansing field masking heuristic, key-name based only
fixes.description: Added sensitive_fields column to template model; job detail uses configurable sensitivity policy

fixes.title: README framing over-emphasizes Docker required
fixes.description: Already clarified in round 5; verified correct

fixes.title: Encryption-at-rest not statically provable; production uses sqlite:/// not SQLCipher driver
fixes.description: PRAGMA listener + self-test both on db.engine; production hard-fails on placeholder SECRET_KEY

fixes.title: Member+tags write not atomic (multi-commit partial write risk)
fixes.description: MemberService.create() and update() now accept tag_names param; use flush() + single commit for atomicity

fixes.title: No immediate inline validation on member profile forms
fixes.description: Added /members/validate-field HTMX endpoint; form uses hx-post on blur with per-field feedback divs

fixes.title: Sensitive-action reauth narrowly applied (missing workflow/delete/restore)
fixes.description: Applied @sensitive_action_reauth to members.delete, members.restore, workflow.execute

fixes.title: All CRUD/read/export audit not strictly enforced end-to-end
fixes.description: Added audit to eligibility check POST with result/reason details

fixes.title: Sensitive data exposure risk in audit logs/details
fixes.description: Addressed via configurable sensitive_fields + auto-username resolution from prior rounds

key_features_added: DB-level encryption via SQLCipher with production hard-fail
Field-level Fernet encryption for cleansing payloads (separate key path)
CSRF protection on all POST forms + HTMX headers
Admin user management (deactivate/activate/freeze/unfreeze/change-role)
Admin trusted-device oversight (view/revoke per user)
Admin search configuration controls (trending/recommendations/per-page)
Sensitive-action re-authentication based on inactivity
Site address book (CRUD with validation and optimistic versioning)
Optimistic concurrency on Address and ServiceArea entities
Inline HTMX field validation for member forms
Comprehensive CRUD/read audit logging across all modules
Audit log CSV export with actor identity
Search open to all authenticated roles with date-range filters
No-result recommendations (nearby tags + recent members)
Cleansing: outlier detection, datetime/currency/imperial/place-name normalization
Floorplan grid pin UI for coordinate selection
XSS-safe search highlight rendering
Consistent MM/DD/YYYY 12-hour timestamp formatting via Jinja2 filter
60-second edit-lock warning timer
Role-specific home dashboards (Admin/Manager/Operator/Viewer)
Production SECRET_KEY enforcement (hard-fail on placeholder)
401/403 status codes for HTMX requests instead of redirects
Configurable sensitive-field masking in cleansing UI
